note: Auto-extracted from QC PDF via pdf-parse. "raw" preserves verbatim PDF text per case for traceability; refine desc/steps/expected during component automation.

testcases.raw: TC_01MCQUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

TC_02MCQ FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

TC_03MCQ FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page

TC_04MCQ FunctionalityVerify if user is able to add Generic step 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step

TC_05MCQ FunctionalityVerify if user able to enter the step title 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title

TC_06MCQ Functionality Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on cancel button The step creation pop up should be closed

TC_07MCQ Functionality Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen

TC_08MCQ Functionality Verify that user able to enter "Instructions for Students" 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.Click on next button 7.Enter Data in " Instructions for Student " User Should able to Enter Data in Instructions for Student

TC_09MCQ Functionality Verify that user able to enter "Instructions for Teachers" 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.Click on Next Button 7.Enter Data in " instructions for Teacher " User Should able to Enter Data in Instructions for Teacher
